scripts.bootstrap:desktop-runtime: echo Desktop runtime bootstrap is handled from repo-level scripts
scripts.prepare:python-runtime: echo Python runtime packaging is not enabled in the clean research repo yet
scripts.prepare:openclaw-runtime: echo OpenClaw runtime packaging is not enabled in the clean research repo yet
scripts.prepare:desktop-runtime: npm run prepare:python-runtime && npm run prepare:openclaw-runtime
scripts.build:installer: echo Installer build is deferred in the clean research repo
scripts.verify:installer: echo Installer verification is deferred in the clean research repo
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:3001 && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV_URL=http://localhost:3001 electron electron/main.cjs"
scripts.electron:pack: npm run prepare:desktop-runtime && vite build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.electron:dist: npm run prepare:desktop-runtime && vite build && electron-builder --dir && npm run build:installer && npm run verify:installer
